REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. THIS MOTION IS BASED ON A PURPORTED BREACH OF A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT, HOWEVER MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PRESENT EVIDENCE OF BREACH. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT DECLARATION OF DAVID PLEIMANN IN SUPPORT OF THIS MOTION PURPORTS TO INCLUDE TWO EXHIBITS, WHICH ARE NOT ATTACHED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT, OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. IS OFF CALENDAR. INSUFFICIENT NOTICE PER CCP 1005 AND CCP 1013. THE COURT ALSO NOTICE THAT THE NOTICE OF MOTION IS SIGNED ON AUGUST 26, 2025 AND THE PURPORTED PROOF OF SERVICE IS DATED AUGUST 21, 2025. FURTHERMORE, THE PURPORTED HEARING DATE LISTED ON THE "DECLARATION" IS AUGUST 29, 2025. ALSO, THE FILING DOES NOT INCLUDE A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. SEE CRC 3.1112. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion & Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Settlement
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID PLEIMANN , AN INDIVIDUAL Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion & Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Settlement

is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. The Court also notice that the Notice of Motion is signed on August 26, 2025 and the purported proof of service is dated August 21, 2025. Furthermore, the purported hearing date listed on the "Declaration" is August 29, 2025. Also, the filing does not include a Memorandum of Points and Authorities. See CRC 3.1112.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Elizabeth Hurwitz; 415-795-3579; Ad Astra Law Group; appearing as counsel for plaintiff David Pleimann.
No other appearances.

Plaintiff contests the courts tentative ruling. Not agued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID PLEIMANN , AN INDIVIDUAL Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Settlement is DENIED. This motion is based on a purported breach of a settlement agreement, however moving party failed to present evidence of breach. The Court also notes that Declaration of David Pleimann in support of this motion purports to include two exhibits, which are not attached.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Terms Of Stipulation For Settlement
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Geoffrey Murry; Ad Astra Law Group, LLP; 415-795-3579; appearing as counsel for plaintiff David Pleimann.
Robby Phillips; 415-516-1035; defendant, appearing in Pro Per.

Mr. Murry contests the court's tentative decision. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID PLEIMANN'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT is DENIED without prejudice. No competent evidence of breach submitted.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
